title: rubus × axilliflorus
intro: Rubus × axilliflorus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × axilliflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary applications, although caution should be exercised due to potential allergic reactions.
